questionHtml: Evaluate the effect of the change in distribution of the different life stages of ticks on the spread of Lyme disease in south-eastern Canada.
markschemeHtml:
a. nymphs present through most of year/longer period/from March to November/through spring and summer «so more risk of infection» ✔

b. more adults in winter/in January/February so more risk of infection then ✔

c. infection will be possible through more/most months of/throughout the year ✔

d. Lyme disease likely to/will increase ✔

meta.title: Evaluate the effect of the change in distribution of the different life stages of ticks on the spread of Lyme disease in south-eastern Canada.
